changeSet.author: bestiary
bestiary
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE monsters ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), source_external_id bigint NULL UNIQUE, slug varchar(120) NOT NULL UNIQUE, name_engloc text NULL, name_rusloc text NOT NULL, alignment_id uuid NULL REFERENCES alignments(id), size varchar(20) NOT NULL, size_secondary varchar(20) NULL, is_swarm boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false, swarm_size varchar(20) NULL, armor_class smallint NOT NULL, armor_class_text text NULL, initiative_bonus smallint NULL, initiative_score smallint NULL, hp_average int NULL, hp_dice_count smallint NULL, hp_dice_sides smallint NULL, hp_dice_modifier int NULL, hp_formula text NULL, str_score smallint NOT NULL, dex_score smallint NOT NULL, con_score smallint NOT NULL, int_score smallint NOT NULL, wis_score smallint NOT NULL, cha_score smallint NOT NULL, passive_perception smallint NULL, telepathy_ft int NULL, cr_rating varchar(10) NOT NULL, cr_value numeric(5,3) NOT NULL, xp_base int NULL, xp_lair int NULL, proficiency_bonus smallint NULL, legendary_uses_base smallint NULL, legendary_uses_lair smallint NULL, legendary_text text NULL, lore_text text NULL, campaign_id uuid NULL REFERENCES campaigns(id), homebrew_id uuid NULL REFERENCES homebrew_packages(id), created_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT ck_monsters_campaign_xor_homebrew CHECK (NOT (campaign_id IS NOT NULL AND homebrew_id IS NOT NULL)) ); CREATE INDEX idx_monsters_cr_value ON monsters (cr_value); CREATE INDEX idx_monsters_size ON monsters (size);

changeSet.author: bestiary
bestiary
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE monster_features ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), monster_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES monsters(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, section varchar(30) NOT NULL, sort_order int NOT NULL, name_engloc text NULL, name_rusloc text NULL, kind varchar(20) NOT NULL, recharge_min smallint NULL, recharge_max smallint NULL, description_engloc text NULL, description_rusloc text NOT NULL, attack_type varchar(10) NULL, attack_bonus smallint NULL, reach_ft smallint NULL, range_ft smallint NULL, range_long_ft smallint NULL, save_ability varchar(20) NULL, save_dc smallint NULL ); CREATE INDEX idx_monster_features_lookup ON monster_features (monster_id, section, sort_order);
CREATE TABLE feature_damages ( id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), feature_id uuid NOT NULL REFERENCES monster_features(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, sort_order int NOT NULL, average smallint NULL, dice varchar(30) NULL, damage_type varchar(20) NULL, note text NULL ); CREATE INDEX idx_feature_damages_feature ON feature_damages (feature_id);
